name: Minecraft Java Server
description: Minecraft Java Edition server using Docker. Supports Paper/Spigot/Vanilla with auto-updates and RCON.

commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl ca-certificates gnupg
apt-get update && apt-get install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-compose-plugin

mkdir -p /opt/minecraft && cat > /opt/minecraft/docker-compose.yml << 'EOF'
services:
  mc:
    image: itzg/minecraft-server
    restart: always
    ports:
      - '25565:25565'
    environment:
      EULA: 'TRUE'
      TYPE: 'PAPER'
      MEMORY: '3G'
      ENABLE_RCON: 'true'
      RCON_PASSWORD: 'changeme'
    volumes:
      - ./data:/data
EOF
post_create.notes: Server on port 25565. RCON on port 25575 (password: changeme). Change RCON password!
